instructions: Start the server with valid env vars (POSTGRES_URL pointing at a running Postgres, DRAGONFLY_URL pointing at a running Dragonfly/Redis, OPENROUTER_API_KEY with a valid key). Send HTTP GET /health and verify the response.
acceptance: GET /health returns HTTP 200 with JSON body containing 'status': 'ok' at top level
GET /health response includes 'postgres' indicator with status 'up'
GET /health response includes 'dragonfly' indicator with status 'up'
GET /health response includes 'openrouter' indicator with status 'up'
Server logs structured JSON (or pretty-printed in dev mode) via pino on startup
Server shuts down gracefully on SIGTERM within 5 seconds
